headline.text: L2 FFS ended the window with *all pouches rejected* — maintenance working at shift close with no resolution yet.

per_plant_summary.L1: Sollich 3 and 4 both ran with intermittent equipment issues — most cleared inside the shift. S2 enrober cleaning is *12 hours behind* due to maintenance rebuilds blocking access. Tates cookie bar cases will not arrive until Friday, two days late.
per_plant_summary.L2: FFS ran the full window but stopped *five times* for blade fouling and seal issues. Ended with all-reject fault at 07:16 with no resolution. ML2 cannot label three items due to missing manufacturing routing. ML3 ran clean after implementing two-hour cross-conveyor wipe cycle.
per_plant_summary.L3: ML4 completed startup after clearing debris from pre-heating hood and repairing damaged equipment. ML1 fought belt tracking and roller issues across three shifts — C1, C6, and Bosch all flagged. MF Matrix up after changeover. Truffle Cavanna running with manageable double-pack rate after hour-long tune by Preston.

notes.text: Shoe found in S2 kitchen area — Jody addressing with team.
Brandon Lance reports cross conveyor buildup eliminated by cleaning every two hours instead of end-of-shift.
Frederick implementing dedicated washroom EEs on day shift to prevent mold mix-ups after 60g molds found in 35g tote.

resolved.title: S3 cooling failure — soft chocolate on finished piece
resolved.summary: Product not firming in tunnel, chocolate soft at pack. Operators stopped line at 13:25, temps verified high.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 13:50 — Nathan verified sucotherm 172° and CAR 158° within range, line resumed. Katya confirmed product firming properly by 13:55 (Katya Farnsworth).

resolved.title: S4 mixing tank red alarm — lid sensor fault
resolved.summary: Mixer showing maintenance alarm at 14:30, kitchen stopped.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 14:42 — maintenance bypassed alarm, kitchen resumed. Lid sensor inspection scheduled for following day (Marcos Jimenez).

resolved.title: S3 riser pump faulted on high pressure
resolved.summary: Return pump tripped at 22:40, stopping chocolate flow to enrober.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 22:50 — operator reset alarm, restarted pumps, performed manual purge to verify no cloggage. System running normally (William Beattie).

resolved.title: S3 metal detector belt off track
resolved.summary: Belt rolled over on east side due to closed airflow valve and chocolate buildup on roller.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 08:05 — maintenance opened airflow valve and removed chocolate buildup, line resumed (S3 Enrober).

resolved.title: S3 Z conveyor cover loose and noisy
resolved.summary: Cover not properly installed, EEs reporting weird sounds at 19:06.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 19:10 — William Beattie confirmed covers not needed and will remove (William Beattie).

resolved.title: FFS bag sealing failure
resolved.summary: Line down at 10:49, bags not sealing properly on mid-shift.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 10:51 — maintenance fixed, line running. Jeffrey Barney confirmed still seeing blow-offs but improved (Jeffrey Barney).

resolved.title: FFS pouch weights high, rejecting at 275.7g
resolved.summary: Line stopped at 17:25, weights above 270g max but piece count correct at 19 per pouch.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 17:34 — Wilson Amaris approved max target adjustment to 275g, line resumed (Brandon Lance).

resolved.title: Grinding supersack damaged, product exposed
resolved.summary: Torn inner bag found at end of processing graham box at 04:03, holes in bottom of outer box.
resolved.resolution: 440 lbs grinded grahams and 20 lbs unprocessed placed on hold. Team instructed to inspect all boxes before loading (Victor Leandro).

resolved.title: ML3 line stop — brief outage
resolved.summary: Line down at 06:34 for unspecified reason.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 06:46 — maintenance completed work, line back up in 12 minutes (Molding Line 3 Pack).

resolved.title: ML1 Cavanna open packages — 10-minute bin fill
resolved.summary: Flow-wrap seal failure at 14:19, massive open-pack rate, operator filled rejection bin in ten minutes.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 14:50 — Shawn adjusted jaws to stop cutting into chocolate, sealing restored (Molding Line 1 Flow-Wrap).

resolved.title: MF Matrix upper load arm spring fault
resolved.summary: Load arm failing at 09:05, affecting pouch feed consistency.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 09:37 — Nathan adjusted weight, mvf amp, pouch feed sensor, and spring tension. Machine running smooth at 44 ppm (Nathan Ruiz).

resolved.title: MF Matrix wrong chocolate in supersack
resolved.summary: SRS dark chocolate piece found in supersack at 09:58 during inspection.
resolved.resolution: Frederick created OPL and stationed EE to inspect all product from supersack. Only one foreign piece found (Frederick Peairs).

resolved.title: ML1 wrong molds in tote — 60g in 35g batch
resolved.summary: Visual inspection at 13:04 found 60g molds mixed into 35g tote after washing.
resolved.resolution: Frederick implementing dedicated washroom EEs on day shift to prevent mixing. No tracking system exists for mold washing currently (Frederick Peairs).

resolved.title: ML4 pre-heating hood #2 damaged
resolved.summary: Hood found damaged during photo documentation at 04:14, line stopped to repair before depositing.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 05:38 — maintenance repaired hood, line resumed depositing on schedule (Kimberly Morales).

resolved.title: ML4 product not demolding, surface defects
resolved.summary: Bars coming out of tunnel at 06:55 but sticking in molds, showing appearance issues.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 07:14 — Preston explained untempered chocolate from depositor 1 after downtime. Product demolding cleanly after purge cycle (Itzel Chavez).

needs_attention.title: Tates cookie bar cases will not arrive until Friday
needs_attention.summary: Item 41152 cases needed for tomorrow production — 6,000 required, only 1,665 V1 on hand (unusable). West Rock delivery two days late.
needs_attention.status: Curt confirmed at 15:40 boxes will not arrive until Friday. Janell notes delayed 11:00 startup may provide buffer depending on delivery time and location.

needs_attention.title: S2 enrober cleaning 12 hours behind schedule
needs_attention.summary: Day shift unable to start wash at 11:45 — maintenance rebuilding heaters and other enrober parts blocked access.
needs_attention.status: Still need to drain dark chocolate from enrober and empty milk buffer (72% full) as of 11:56. Prevents next product startup.

needs_attention.title: S2 kitchen wet area and curtain contamination risk
needs_attention.summary: Rusty water pooling under curtain next to heavy-wash floor since 07:20, curtain may need section replaced.
needs_attention.status: Mary Montilla requested thorough cleaning plan at 10:56. Charity asked for walk-through at 13:33. No action confirmed by end of window.

needs_attention.title: S3 chiller second compressor not auto-starting
needs_attention.summary: Chiller swinging between 0°C and 5°C since 14:52, only one compressor running when two needed.
needs_attention.status: William walked Nathan through manual start of second compressor at 15:24. Maintenance investigating why auto-start logic not working.

needs_attention.title: S4 tunnel 1 condensation or leak
needs_attention.summary: Visible moisture issue on cooling tunnel 1 flagged at 15:15.
needs_attention.status: Maintenance called at 15:15, no resolution or root cause posted by window close.

needs_attention.title: S3 depositor nozzle clogged, piston removed
needs_attention.summary: East-side nozzle plugged at 15:20, blocking caramel flow. Could not clear with standard procedure.
needs_attention.status: Piston removed at 15:24 to prevent caramel flowing through return belts. Running with one nozzle offline.

needs_attention.title: EPJ 6 pallet jack out of service
needs_attention.summary: Shaft coming out, whole unit wobbling — unsafe to operate as of 12:36.
needs_attention.status: Reported to Tiffanee Taylor and Justin Garner at 12:36, no maintenance ETA provided.

needs_attention.title: FFS all pouches rejected at line end
needs_attention.summary: Line down at 07:16 (shift close) with every pouch being rejected by system.
needs_attention.status: Maintenance working on it as of 07:16. No resolution or root cause identified before window closed.

needs_attention.title: FFS recurring blade fouling — five cleaning stops
needs_attention.summary: Line stopped at 12:01, 14:04, 14:12 for blade cleaning to clear open pouches. Chronic issue across all three shifts.
needs_attention.status: Cleaning frequency increased but issue recurring. Last blade clean before final shift at 14:12. Contributing to final all-reject fault at 07:16.

needs_attention.title: ML2 cannot label three items — missing routing
needs_attention.summary: Items 21151, 30883, 30883-Case18 produced at shift end, NetSuite only has ML1 manufacturing routing.
needs_attention.status: Nidia notified responsible parties via email and Teams at 22:32. Awaiting ML2 routing setup to release product.

needs_attention.title: ML4 gondola exit belt missing screw, metal shavings inside
needs_attention.summary: Hardware missing from gondola belt assembly at 06:25, metal debris found during inspection.
needs_attention.status: Maintenance called at 06:25, Nelson Cook en route. Preston identified M6 bolt needed at 06:28. No confirmation of repair by window close.

needs_attention.title: ML1 C1 and C2 belts stopping on own — tracking sensor fault
needs_attention.summary: Conveyors auto-stopping frequently since 11:50, maintenance advising operators to just reset.
needs_attention.status: Preston explained at 13:05 tracking sensors trigger fault when belt favors one side too long. Needs tracking adjustment to force actuation back and forth. C1 still stopping at 21:56 on third shift.

needs_attention.title: ML1 C6 bad roller, belt frayed and tracking south
needs_attention.summary: Bosch belt coming off at 22:36, C6 roller damaged at 22:44, belt frayed by 23:21, still tracking wrong at 00:43.
needs_attention.status: Maintenance working continuously from 22:43 through 00:43. Multiple issues — Bosch belt, C6 bad roller, frayed belt, south tracking — all interrelated. Still being addressed at window close.

needs_attention.title: ML4 bolt/screw found under pre-heating hood during startup clean
needs_attention.summary: Foreign metal object discovered at 03:01 during extensive pre-startup cleaning.
needs_attention.status: Maintenance notified at 03:01. Origin of hardware unknown, no follow-up posted.

needs_attention.title: MF Matrix missing item 40725 elbows for startup
needs_attention.summary: Pre-op complete at 04:00 but cannot start correctly — reference 40725 elbows not in stock.
needs_attention.status: Janeth confirmed at 04:00 elbows not in inventory, startup held. No ETA for parts delivery.

needs_attention.title: MF Matrix hopper clogging with caramel texture
needs_attention.summary: Hopper received full at shift start (06:42), caramel texture causing product to stick, requiring manual removal and direct belt feed.
needs_attention.status: Isis reports at 06:42 operators manually clearing hopper and placing product directly onto conveyor belt. Workaround in place but inefficient.

needs_attention.title: ML1 plastic wrapper pieces in rework chocolate tote
needs_attention.summary: Tote of chocolate for remelting received at 07:03 with plastic contamination from bar wrappers.
needs_attention.status: Jenny instructed all shifts at 07:03 that unwrapping teams must ensure no plastic in rework totes. Training/process issue, no formal corrective action posted.
